400.message: [400] {{ifempty(body.message; 'PolyDoc rejected the request. Check your source and options.')}}

401.message: [401] Invalid PolyDoc API key. Check the key in your connection (dashboard.polydoc.tech, API Keys).

403.message: [403] This PolyDoc account is disabled. Contact hello@polydoc.tech.

413.message: [413] The request is too large. Reduce the source size.

422.message: [422] {{ifempty(body.message; 'Validation failed. For e-invoices, include payment terms or a due date and a seller tax ID for standard VAT.')}}

429.message: [429] PolyDoc rate limit reached. Slow down and retry shortly.
